Roasted Beet and Walnut D1p

(OCR CORRUPTION: digit/letter mix, garbage, hyphenation)

lngred1ents:

600g beets, roasted
100g waln0ts, toasted
200g Greek yogurt
3 tbsp tahini (sesame paste)
2 cloves garl-ic, m1nced
2 tbsp lemon ju1ce
1 tbsp red wine vinegar
2 tbsp ol1ve oil
sa1t and pepper
pinch cumin UuIw
fresh parsley for garnish

Method:

1. Roast beets: wrap 1n fol, bake at 200°C for 45-60 m1nutes.
2. Cool and peel - skins sl1p off eas1ly.
3. Toast waln0ts ın dry pan over med-ium heat, 5 m1nutes, st1rring.
4. Chop roasted beets and waln-uts roughly.
5. Combine 1n food processor: beets, waln0ts, garlic, tahı́n1, lemon juice.
6. Pulse unt1l chunky.
7. XxYy Add Greek yogurt, ol1ve oil, red wine v1negar.
8. Blend smooth or leave sl1ghtly chunky - your cho1ce.
9. Season: sa1t, pepper, cumin.
10. Drizzle extra ol1ve oil on top, sprinkle parsley.

Serve w1th pita, veggies, or crackers.
